children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: The Secretary, acting through the Assistant Secretary, shall establish or operate a National Peer-Run Training and Technical Assistance Center for Addiction Recovery Support (referred to in this section as the “Center”).

children.label: B
children.text: resources to assist individuals with a substance use disorder, or resources for families of an individual with a substance use disorder; and

children.label: C
children.text: best practices for the delivery of recovery support services;
the provision of translation services, interpretation, or other such services for clients with limited English speaking proficiency;
data collection to support research, including for translational research;

children.label: A
children.text: professional development of peer support specialists; and

children.label: B
children.text: making recovery support services available in nonclinical settings; and
evaluation and improvement, as necessary, of the effectiveness of such services provided by recovery community organizations.

children.heading: Best practices
children.label: c Best practices
children.text: The Center established under subsection (a) shall periodically issue best practices for use by recovery community organizations and peer support networks.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary may establish one regional technical assistance center (referred to in this subsection as the “Regional Center”), with existing resources, to assist the Center in carrying out activities described in subsection (b) within the geographic region of such Regional Center in a manner that is tailored to the needs of such region.

children.label: A
children.text: a description of the distinct roles and responsibilities of the Regional Center and the Center;

children.label: B
children.text: available information relating to the outcomes of the Regional Center under this subsection, such as any impact on the operations and efficiency of the Center relating to requests for technical assistance and support within the region of such Regional Center;

children.label: C
children.text: a description of any gaps or areas of duplication relating to the activities of the Regional Center and the Center within such region; and

children.label: D
children.text: recommendations relating to the modification, expansion, or termination of the Regional Center under this subsection.

children.heading: Recovery community organization
children.label: e Recovery community organization
children.text: In this section, the term “recovery community organization” has the meaning given such term in .section 290ee–2 of this title

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: f Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $2,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2026 through 2030.
